name: taruvi-refine-template
postCreateCommand: bash -lc '[ -f .mcp.json ] || cp .mcp.example.json .mcp.json; [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env; mkdir -p .codex/projects; source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; npm install --legacy-peer-deps; command -v codex >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @openai/codex'

postAttachCommand.app: bash -lc 'source /usr/local/share/nvm/nvm.sh; nvm install 22; nvm use 22; [ -d node_modules ] || npm install --legacy-peer-deps; npm run dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173'

commands.name: ⚙️ Setup .env
commands.tooltip: Open .env and fill in your Taruvi credentials (copy from the onboarding page)

commands.name: 🔑 Connect Codex
commands.tooltip: Fetch your AI provider key from Taruvi secrets and launch Codex

commands.name: 🚀 Dev Server
commands.tooltip: Start the development server on port 5173
